thresholdSource: criticalLow 1.0 / criticalHigh 10: Beaumont Laboratory Critical (Panic) Values list, Phosphorus (>14 days-Adult): <1 mg/dL / >10 mg/dL (BL.OP.RG.006.r04, effective 03/04/2024 — institutional tier). Corroborated by Northwestern Medicine HealthLab critical values list, Phosphorus Adult critical low <1.1 mg/dL (Central DuPage Hospital, updated Dec 2025 — no adult critical-high entry for phosphorus on that list). plausibleLow 0.3: conservative floor below a documented survived case of phosphorus <0.41 mg/dL causing toxic-metabolic encephalopathy that resolved to alert mentation after repletion (PMC6962441). plausibleHigh 22: above a documented survived case of phosphorus 19.3 mg/dL in a uremic patient who improved with dialysis (PMC8715221). Draft — not clinician-approved.
